summary: Comprehensive frontend E2E testing (frontend-only per request). All 6 requested flows PASSED: contact form submission (home->fill->calendar->submit->success), navigation scroll, admin login, lead appears in dashboard, lead detail dialog (status + notes update), filter tabs (all/new/contacted/qualified/closed correctly filter rows), delete lead with confirm, mobile responsive (no overflow at 375x667).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Calendar uses disabled={(d) => d < new Date()} which disables today because 'new Date()' includes current time-of-day. Consider comparing by date-only to allow booking for today.
Minor: AdminDashboard uses window.confirm() for delete; acceptable but a shadcn AlertDialog would be more consistent with the design system.
Minor: The LeadDetailDialog does not show any error banner inside the dialog on save failure (only sonner toast). Fine for now.
Track Record section previously flagged id='about' vs id='track-record' (low priority; from iteration_2). Nav still functions.
seed_data_creation: Created one lead 'E2E_TEST_1778063315' (Dean, E2E University 1778063315) via contact form, updated its status to 'contacted' with notes, then deleted it. Final state: 5 leads remain (TEST_Update Lead x2, TEST_Dean John x2, Test User).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E tested: contact form submit flow WORKS with role dropdown + calendar date picker + submit (thank-you screen shown). Admin login WORKS. Lead appears in admin dashboard table (verified via unique E2E_TEST_<timestamp> name). LeadDetailDialog opens on row click, status select + notes textarea + save button all work (PATCH /api/leads/:id returns ok, table badge updates immediately). Filter tabs verified functional: all=6, new=3, contacted=3, qualified=0, closed=0 after status update. Delete via dropdown 'More' actions button + confirm dialog WORKS (stats update: 6→5). Mobile viewport 375x667: no horizontal overflow. Note: use data-testid selectors — lead action button is [data-testid='lead-actions-<id>'] and delete is [data-testid='lead-delete-<id>'] (portal-rendered via Radix DropdownMenu). Navigation nav links work for Technologies/Solutions; Footer has duplicate anchors with same hrefs so use header nav in tests. Initial '401' console errors on home are from GET /api/auth/me when not logged in — expected behavior.
rca of the issue: No outstanding issues. Earlier false alarm on filter tabs was due to my test script using text=/Leads \(/ which grabbed a stale text node; verified via direct tbody tr count that filter works correctly.
